bg.name: Background
bg.description: Stage background, full-bleed behind the play field.

fg.name: Foreground
fg.description: Header text and generic foreground color.

blade.name: Blade trail
blade.description: Color of the slice trail that follows the pointer.

good_1.name: Fruit color 1
good_1.description: First fruit fill color in the spawn palette.

good_2.name: Fruit color 2
good_2.description: Second fruit fill color in the spawn palette.

good_3.name: Fruit color 3
good_3.description: Third fruit fill color in the spawn palette.

good_stroke.name: Fruit outline
good_stroke.description: Outline / rind color drawn around each fruit.

hazard.name: Bomb color
hazard.description: Fill color of the bomb the player must not slice.

hazard_stroke.name: Bomb outline
hazard_stroke.description: Outline color drawn around the bomb.

button_bg.name: Primary button bg
button_bg.description: Background of the Start / Try again primary button.

button_hover.name: Primary button hover bg
button_hover.description: Hover background of the primary button.

focus_ring.name: Focus ring
focus_ring.description: Outline shown on buttons / the stage when keyboard focus enters.

art_good.name: Fruit art (optional)
art_good.description: Optional image drawn for each fruit instead of the built-in shape. Absent means the drawn shape is used.

art_hazard.name: Bomb art (optional)
art_hazard.description: Optional image drawn for the bomb instead of the built-in shape. Absent means the drawn shape is used.
